pi_items.source: Verified from setup_openclinica.sh and setup_task.sh which explicitly define and initialize the DM-TRIAL-2024 study.
Verified from setup_task.sh which explicitly modifies the initial baseline parameters into incorrect states and explicitly details the target corrections in comments that match these values exactly.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for openclinica_env correct_subject_demographics task by confirming that the subjects (DM-101, DM-102, DM-103) and their initial baseline data are synthetically generated and explicitly modified via setup_task.sh PostgreSQL queries. Verified the exact target gender and date of birth parameters explicitly match the task description instructions. Additionally, discovered that the task is defective because verifier.py is entirely missing from the environment, rendering the task unscorable.
